example_1_en: Proper shield termination is required for high-frequency Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) control.
example_1_zh: 高頻 EMC 控制需要適當的屏蔽端接。
example_2_en: A proper bonding path should be short and low impedance.
example_2_zh: 適當的搭接路徑應該短且低阻抗。

example_1_en: Good wiring design reduces Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risk.
example_1_zh: 良好的配線設計可降低 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 風險。
example_2_en: Wiring changes should be reviewed before retesting.
example_2_zh: 重新測試前應審查配線變更。

example_1_en: Grounding issues may cause unexpected noise.
example_1_zh: 接地問題可能造成非預期雜訊。
example_2_en: The team should record each Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) issue during integration.
example_2_zh: 團隊應在整合期間記錄每個 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 問題。

example_1_en: The scope of this document covers vehicle-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risks.
example_1_zh: 本文件範圍涵蓋載具級 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 風險。
example_2_en: The scope must clearly define what is included and excluded.
example_2_zh: 範圍必須清楚定義包含與排除的項目。

example_1_en: The introduction explains the purpose of the Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) plan.
example_1_zh: 導論說明 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 計畫的目的。
example_2_en: The introduction summarizes the scope and applicable standards.
example_2_zh: 導論摘要說明範圍與適用標準。

example_1_en: Grounding and shielding should be reviewed during design review.
example_1_zh: 接地與屏蔽應在設計審查中檢查。
example_2_en: The consultant can support the Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) design review.
example_2_zh: 顧問可支援 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 設計審查。

example_1_en: The main risk is poor shielding continuity.
example_1_zh: 主要風險是屏蔽連續性不佳。
example_2_en: Early testing can reduce Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) integration risk.
example_2_zh: 早期測試可以降低 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 整合風險。

example_1_en: A checklist helps ensure consistent bonding inspection.
example_1_zh: 檢查表有助於確保搭接檢查一致。
example_2_en: We should prepare a grounding and shielding checklist.
example_2_zh: 我們應準備接地與屏蔽檢查表。

example_1_en: Power return should not be confused with chassis bonding.
example_1_zh: 電源回流不應與機殼搭接混為一談。
example_2_en: High-current power return paths must be carefully controlled.
example_2_zh: 大電流電源回流路徑必須謹慎控制。

example_1_en: EtherCAN may be used for inter-subsystem communication.
example_1_zh: EtherCAN 可用於子系統間通訊。
example_2_en: EtherCAN shielding should follow the overall bonding strategy.
example_2_zh: EtherCAN 屏蔽應遵循整體搭接策略。

example_1_en: CAN bus is widely used in embedded control systems.
example_1_zh: CAN bus 廣泛用於嵌入式控制系統。
example_2_en: CAN bus routing should be separated from high-current power cables.
example_2_zh: CAN bus 佈線應與大電流電源線分開。

example_1_en: RS-422 is used for differential communication.
example_1_zh: RS-422 用於差動通訊。
example_2_en: RS-422 cable shields should be handled carefully in a composite structure.
example_2_zh: 在複材結構中，RS-422 線纜屏蔽要謹慎處理。

example_1_en: Most subsystems communicate through Ethernet.
example_1_zh: 大多數子系統透過乙太網路通訊。
example_2_en: Shielded Ethernet cables need proper grounding rules.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽乙太網路線需要適當的接地規則。

example_1_en: High-frequency currents are very sensitive to layout.
example_1_zh: 高頻電流對佈局非常敏感。
example_2_en: DC resistance alone does not represent high-frequency behavior.
example_2_zh: 單靠直流電阻無法代表高頻行為。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: We need to understand the applicable Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirements.
example_1_zh: 我們需要了解適用的 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 要求。
example_2_en: The grounding design should meet vehicle-level requirements.
example_2_zh: 接地設計應符合載具級要求。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: The issue becomes critical during avionics integration.
example_1_zh: 這個問題在航電整合時會變得很關鍵。
example_2_en: Integration testing may reveal grounding weaknesses.
example_2_zh: 整合測試可能暴露接地弱點。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: This is a system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) integration issue.
example_1_zh: 這是系統級 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 整合問題。
example_2_en: We need a system-level grounding architecture, not only box-level compliance.
example_2_zh: 我們需要系統級接地架構，而不只是單機合規。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: Copper foil overlap should be planned near the panel edge.
example_1_zh: 銅箔搭接應規劃在板邊附近。
example_2_en: Poor overlap can increase contact resistance.
example_2_zh: 不良搭接可能增加接觸電阻。

example_1_en: The installation configuration affects both Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) performance and assembly effort.
example_1_zh: 安裝配置會同時影響 EMC 表現與組裝工時。
example_2_en: We compared two installation configurations for the A2 section.
example_2_zh: 我們比較了 A2 段的兩種安裝配置。

example_1_en: The impedance must be controlled in high-speed avionics wiring.
example_1_zh: 高速航電線路中的阻抗必須被控制。
example_2_en: Cable impedance affects signal integrity and Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) performance.
example_2_zh: 電纜阻抗會影響訊號完整性與 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 表現。

example_1_en: The installation plan should leave enough space for rework.
example_1_zh: 安裝規劃應保留足夠的重工空間。
example_2_en: Rework may be required if the copper foil edge is damaged.
example_2_zh: 若銅箔邊緣受損，可能需要重工。

example_1_en: The A4 baseline uses 100 micrometer copper foil and a 1 millimeter busbar.
example_1_zh: A4 基準配置使用 100 微米銅箔與 1 毫米銅排。
example_2_en: A clear baseline helps compare weight changes between options.
example_2_zh: 明確的基準有助於比較各方案的重量變化。

example_1_en: The design scope is limited to conductive materials and standard fasteners.
example_1_zh: 設計範圍限於導電材料與標準固定件。
example_2_en: Adhesive and protective film are outside the current design scope.
example_2_zh: 黏著劑與保護膜不在目前設計範圍內。

example_1_en: Functional analysis breaks a high-level requirement into detailed functions.
example_1_zh: 功能分析會把高層級需求拆成詳細功能。
example_2_en: The team used functional analysis to define bonding interfaces.
example_2_zh: 團隊使用功能分析來定義接合介面。

example_1_en: The system requirement must be traceable to the mission objective.
example_1_zh: 系統需求必須能追溯到任務目標。
example_2_en: A clear system requirement prevents different teams from using different assumptions.
example_2_zh: 清楚的系統需求可避免不同團隊使用不同假設。

example_1_en: A mission requirement is usually defined at the highest level.
example_1_zh: 任務需求通常在最高層級定義。
example_2_en: The mission requirement drives the system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) design.
example_2_zh: 任務需求會推動系統層級的 EMC 設計。

example_1_en: Please refer to the attached file for our responses to your questions.
example_1_zh: 請參考附件中我們對您問題的回覆。
example_2_en: The response should be concise but technically complete.
example_2_zh: 回覆應簡潔但技術內容完整。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Power level control can reduce RF risk during integration testing.
example_1_zh: 功率等級控制可降低整合測試期間的 RF 風險。
example_2_en: The RF module should support power level control if desense is observed.
example_2_zh: 若觀察到 desense，RF 模組應支援功率等級控制。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Each operation mode should have a defined Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) observation item.
example_1_zh: 每個操作模式都應有定義好的 EMC 觀察項目。
example_2_en: Quiet mode and RF transmit mode are two important operation modes.
example_2_zh: Quiet mode 與 RF transmit mode 是兩個重要操作模式。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Worst-case simultaneous operation should include RF transmit and actuator motion.
example_1_zh: 最壞情境同時操作應包含 RF 發射與致動器動作。
example_2_en: The system must not lose critical data during worst-case simultaneous operation.
example_2_zh: 系統在最壞情境同時操作時不得遺失關鍵資料。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: High dv/dt switching can capacitively couple noise into sensor wiring.
example_1_zh: 高 dv/dt 切換可能透過電容性耦合把雜訊導入感測器配線。
example_2_en: A shielded enclosure can reduce the effect of high dv/dt switching nodes.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽外殼可降低高 dv/dt 切換節點的影響。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: High di/dt loads such as JetVane drivers require careful routing and filtering.
example_1_zh: JetVane 驅動器等高 di/dt 負載需要謹慎走線與濾波。
example_2_en: The high di/dt current loop should be kept as small as possible.
example_2_zh: 高 di/dt 電流迴路應盡可能縮小。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The control plan links design rules to inspection and test evidence.
example_1_zh: 控制計畫將設計規則連結到檢查與測試證據。
example_2_en: Bonding checks should be listed in the control plan.
example_2_zh: 搭接檢查應列入控制計畫。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) problems often appear during system integration.
example_1_zh: EMC 問題經常在系統整合階段出現。
example_2_en: The grounding condition changes after system integration on a non-conductive ring.
example_2_zh: 系統整合到不導電環上後，接地條件會改變。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The copper busbars interconnect the composite panels and the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 銅排將複合材料面板與航電環互相連接。
example_2_en: All bonding points should be interconnected with low impedance paths.
example_2_zh: 所有搭接點應以低阻抗路徑互連。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Each subsystem will be bonded to the local copper busbar.
example_1_zh: 每個子系統都會搭接到局部銅排。
example_2_en: The avionics ring contains multiple power, RF, and control subsystems.
example_2_zh: 航電環包含多個電源、射頻與控制子系統。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The assumed values shall be confirmed in the final requirements.
example_1_zh: 假設值應在最終需求中確認。
example_2_en: The final requirement will be defined after consultant review.
example_2_zh: 最終需求將在顧問審查後定義。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The bonding resistance shall be checked at each interface.
example_1_zh: 每個介面的搭接電阻都應被檢查。
example_2_en: The interface between the panel and the ring is critical for Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC).
example_2_zh: 面板與航電環之間的介面對 EMC 很關鍵。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: This slide summarizes the responses to consultant questions.
example_1_zh: 這張簡報彙整了對顧問問題的回覆。
example_2_en: Each consultant question should be answered with clear supporting information.
example_2_zh: 每個顧問問題都應以清楚的佐證資訊回覆。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

chinese_meaning: 系統內 EMC；系統內部相容性
example_1_en: Intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) checks whether one onboard subsystem interferes with another.
example_1_zh: 系統內 EMC 檢查一個機載子系統是否會干擾另一個子系統。
example_2_en: JetVane operation is a key intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) case for DAQ monitoring.
example_2_zh: JetVane 動作是 DAQ 監測的重要系統內 EMC 情境。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: We would like to consult with you regarding the grounding architecture.
example_1_zh: 我們想就接地架構向您請教。
example_2_en: The attached file includes discussion topics regarding MIL-STD-464 compliance.
example_2_zh: 附件包含有關 MIL-STD-464 合規性的討論議題。

example_1_en: Please keep the briefing document concise and focused.
example_1_zh: 請讓簡報文件保持簡潔且聚焦。
example_2_en: A concise summary helps the consultant understand the main issue quickly.
example_2_zh: 簡潔的摘要有助於顧問快速了解主要問題。

example_1_en: The key challenge is the non-conductive composite structure.
example_1_zh: 主要挑戰是不導電的複合材質結構。
example_2_en: Cable shield termination is a major challenge in this design.
example_2_zh: 線纜屏蔽端接是此設計中的主要挑戰。

example_1_en: The three composite panels are arranged at 120 degrees.
example_1_zh: 三片複合板以 120 度排列。
example_2_en: The bonding points should be arranged at regular intervals around the ring.
example_2_zh: 搭接點應沿航電環以固定間距排列。

chinese_meaning: 賓士星形結構；三叉星形配置
example_1_en: The A1 mounting panels are arranged in a Mercedes-star configuration.
example_1_zh: A1 安裝板以賓士星形配置排列。
example_2_en: The Mercedes-star layout provides three vertical mounting surfaces inside the ring.
example_2_zh: 賓士星形配置在航電環內提供三個垂直安裝面。

example_1_en: We would appreciate your experience in rocket integration testing.
example_1_zh: 我們很希望了解您在火箭整合測試方面的經驗。
example_2_en: Practical experience is important for grounding and shielding implementation.
example_2_zh: 實務經驗對接地與屏蔽實作非常重要。

example_1_en: The diagram shows the bonding connection between the panels and the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 示意圖顯示複合板與航電環之間的搭接連接。
example_2_en: A clear diagram will help the consultant understand the installation concept.
example_2_zh: 清楚的示意圖有助於顧問理解安裝概念。

chinese_meaning: 有目的的；被設計為某用途的（較少用；名詞建議用 purpose）
example_1_en: The proposed bonding network is purposed to provide a low-impedance reference path.
example_1_zh: 所提出的搭接網路旨在提供低阻抗參考路徑。
example_2_en: In most technical writing, use 'intended' or 'designed' instead of 'purposed'.
example_2_zh: 在多數技術寫作中，建議用 intended 或 designed 取代 purposed。

example_1_en: The proposed topics are intended for the consultant's presentation.
example_1_zh: 這些建議議題是提供給顧問簡報使用的。
example_2_en: We need to review the proposed grounding concept before implementation.
example_2_zh: 在實作前，我們需要審查建議的接地概念。

example_1_en: Countdown constraints may prevent certain RF transmitters from operating.
example_1_zh: 倒數限制可能禁止某些 RF 發射機運作。
example_2_en: Each constraint should be linked to a safety or Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement.
example_2_zh: 每項限制條件都應連結到安全或 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 需求。

example_1_en: The lack of a conductive chassis is the main system-level concern.
example_1_zh: 缺乏導電機殼是主要的系統級疑慮。
example_2_en: A lack of shield continuity can reduce Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) performance.
example_2_zh: 缺乏屏蔽連續性會降低 EMC 性能。

example_1_en: Our main concern is the lack of a conductive reference structure.
example_1_zh: 我們主要的疑慮是缺少導電參考結構。
example_2_en: The consultant should understand our system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) concerns.
example_2_zh: 顧問應了解我們的系統級 EMC 疑慮。

example_1_en: A long pigtail may make the cable shield ineffective at high frequency.
example_1_zh: 過長的豬尾線可能使線纜屏蔽在高頻下失效。
example_2_en: Shielding can be ineffective without a proper termination reference.
example_2_zh: 若沒有適當的端接參考，屏蔽可能無效。

chinese_meaning: 對……反應；回應（注意：不是「導致」，導致可用 lead to / result in）
example_1_en: We need to understand how the system will react to external Radio Frequency (RF) fields.
example_1_zh: 我們需要了解系統會如何對外部 RF 場反應。
example_2_en: The Data Acquisition (DAQ) system may react to conducted noise on the power line.
example_2_zh: DAQ 系統可能會對電源線上的傳導雜訊產生反應。

example_1_en: Shielding effectiveness depends on continuity and proper termination.
example_1_zh: 屏蔽有效性取決於連續性與適當的端接。
example_2_en: We need to verify the effectiveness of the bonding network.
example_2_zh: 我們需要驗證搭接網路的有效性。

example_1_en: Although each subsystem passed Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461), system-level integration still needs to be verified.
example_1_zh: 雖然每個子系統都通過 MIL-STD-461，系統級整合仍然需要驗證。
example_2_en: Although the ring is lightweight, it does not provide a natural conductive reference.
example_2_zh: 雖然航電環很輕，但它不會提供天然的導電參考。

example_1_en: The A1 avionics ring is approximately 110 cm in diameter.
example_1_zh: A1 航電環直徑約 110 公分。
example_2_en: Each composite panel is approximately 50 cm by 40 cm.
example_2_zh: 每片複合板尺寸約為 50 公分乘 40 公分。

example_1_en: The structure may not provide a sufficient Radio Frequency (RF) reference.
example_1_zh: 此結構可能無法提供足夠的 RF 參考。
example_2_en: We need sufficient bonding points around the avionics ring.
example_2_zh: 我們需要在航電環周圍提供足夠的搭接點。

example_1_en: Wire segregation prevents noisy cables from coupling into sensitive signals.
example_1_zh: 線路隔離可避免噪聲線纜耦合到敏感訊號。
example_2_en: Power, RF, and low-level analog wires need proper wire segregation.
example_2_zh: 電源、RF 與低位準類比線路需要適當線路隔離。

example_1_en: A compliance matrix tracks every Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement.
example_1_zh: 符合性矩陣追蹤每項 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 需求。
example_2_en: The compliance matrix should identify verification status and evidence.
example_2_zh: 符合性矩陣應標示驗證狀態與證據。

example_1_en: Susceptibility tests evaluate how equipment reacts to external fields.
example_1_zh: 敏感度測試評估設備對外部場的反應。
example_2_en: Poor shielding increases system susceptibility.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽不良會增加系統敏感度。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: Edge lifting of copper foil should be avoided during installation.
example_1_zh: 施工時應避免銅箔邊緣翹起。
example_2_en: Edge lifting can create unreliable electrical contact.
example_2_zh: 邊緣翹起可能造成不可靠的電氣接觸。

example_1_en: Surface treatment must not insulate the bonding contact area.
example_1_zh: 表面處理不可使搭接接觸面變成絕緣。
example_2_en: Copper, aluminum, and stainless steel may require different surface treatments.
example_2_zh: 銅、鋁與不鏽鋼可能需要不同的表面處理。

example_1_en: Adhesive weight is outside the current estimate boundary.
example_1_zh: 黏著劑重量不在目前估算邊界內。
example_2_en: The adhesive process must prevent copper foil edges from lifting.
example_2_zh: 黏著製程必須避免銅箔邊緣翹起。

example_1_en: The weight estimate includes copper foil, busbars, screws, washers, and braided straps.
example_1_zh: 重量估算包含銅箔、銅排、螺絲、墊片與編織帶。
example_2_en: This weight estimate does not include adhesive or installation loss.
example_2_zh: 此重量估算不包含黏著劑或施工耗損。

example_1_en: Copper foil thickness has a major impact on total weight.
example_1_zh: 銅箔厚度對總重量有很大影響。
example_2_en: The busbar thickness options are 1 millimeter and 2 millimeters.
example_2_zh: 銅排厚度選項為 1 毫米與 2 毫米。

example_1_en: The upper ring busbar length is based on the ring circumference.
example_1_zh: 上方環形銅排長度依據環體圓周長計算。
example_2_en: The circumference is calculated from the ring diameter.
example_2_zh: 圓周長由環體直徑計算。

example_1_en: The final flight article should use the 100 micrometer copper foil baseline.
example_1_zh: 最終飛行件應以 100 微米銅箔為基準。
example_2_en: Prototype weights may differ from the flight article weight.
example_2_zh: 原型件重量可能與飛行件重量不同。

example_1_en: We have identified aerospace-grade materials for the outer surface.
example_1_zh: 我們已找到可用於外表面的航太等級材料。
example_2_en: Aerospace-grade coatings are usually qualified for harsh environments.
example_2_zh: 航太等級塗層通常會通過嚴苛環境的驗證。

chinese_meaning: 待最終確認；需最終確認
example_1_en: The values are preliminary assumptions and subject to final confirmation.
example_1_zh: 這些數值為初步假設，仍待最終確認。
example_2_en: The bonding method is subject to final confirmation by the structural team.
example_2_zh: 搭接方法仍需由結構團隊做最終確認。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
example_2_en: The bonding washer is placed on top of the conductive surface.
example_2_zh: 搭接墊片放置在導電表面上方。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Please refer to the briefing document for more details.
example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考簡報文件。
example_2_en: The briefing document summarizes the current grounding concept.
example_2_zh: 該簡報文件彙整了目前的接地概念。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

chinese_meaning: RF 發射禁止；發射抑制
example_1_en: RF transmit inhibit may be required during sensitive ground operations.
example_1_zh: 敏感地面操作期間可能需要 RF 發射禁止。
example_2_en: The test procedure should verify the RF transmit inhibit function.
example_2_zh: 測試程序應驗證 RF 發射禁止功能。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The acceptance criteria should define allowable functional degradation.
example_1_zh: 驗收標準應定義允許的功能劣化程度。
example_2_en: Mission-critical functions should have no functional degradation during Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) testing.
example_2_zh: 任務關鍵功能在 EMC 測試期間不應有功能劣化。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

chinese_meaning: 多點縫合式連接；密集搭接點
example_1_en: More stitching points reduce the high-frequency impedance of the panel edge.
example_1_zh: 更多 stitching 點可降低板邊高頻阻抗。
example_2_en: RF-sensitive areas should use a shorter stitching interval.
example_2_zh: RF 敏感區應使用較短的 stitching 間距。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The material has ESD protection properties.
example_1_zh: 該材料具有 ESD 保護特性。
example_2_en: Electrical conductivity is an important material property.
example_2_zh: 導電性是一項重要的材料特性。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Copper braided straps will be used to interconnect the panels and the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 銅編織帶將用於互連面板與航電環。
example_2_en: A short copper braided strap reduces bonding inductance.
example_2_zh: 短的銅編織帶可以降低搭接電感。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The values shown in this table are preliminary assumptions.
example_1_zh: 此表中的數值為初步假設。
example_2_en: This grounding layout is based on a preliminary assumption.
example_2_zh: 此接地配置是基於初步假設。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The structural department has preliminarily agreed to this approach.
example_1_zh: 結構部門已初步同意此作法。
example_2_en: The acceptance values were preliminarily defined for discussion.
example_2_zh: 驗收值是為了討論而初步定義的。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: The attached file includes our responses and supporting explanations.
example_1_zh: 附件包含我們的回覆與補充說明。
example_2_en: A supporting explanation is provided for the proposed bonding method.
example_2_zh: 針對建議的搭接方法已提供補充說明。
source_chapter: EMC顧問回覆與系統整合詞彙

example_1_en: Self-compatibility testing checks interference within the vehicle.
example_1_zh: 自相容性測試會檢查載具內部干擾。
example_2_en: Self-compatibility problems often appear when multiple radios operate together.
example_2_zh: 多個無線電同時運作時常會出現自相容性問題。

example_1_en: The braided strap is modeled as tinned copper in the weight estimate.
example_1_zh: 重量估算中將編織帶視為鍍錫銅。
example_2_en: Tinned copper can improve corrosion resistance compared with bare copper.
example_2_zh: 相較於裸銅，鍍錫銅可提升耐腐蝕性。

example_1_en: We would like to consult with an experienced aerospace Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) consultant.
example_1_zh: 我們想請教一位有航太 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 經驗的顧問。
example_2_en: The consultant should review our grounding and shielding concept.
example_2_zh: 顧問應該審查我們的接地與屏蔽概念。

example_1_en: Bonding inspection should be performed after installation.
example_1_zh: 安裝後應執行搭接檢查。
example_2_en: Visual inspection alone is not sufficient for bonding verification.
example_2_zh: 僅靠目視檢查不足以驗證搭接。

example_1_en: The consultant should help define acceptance criteria.
example_1_zh: 顧問應協助定義驗收標準。
example_2_en: Bonding resistance limits should be part of the acceptance criteria.
example_2_zh: 搭接電阻限制應納入驗收標準。

example_1_en: The coax shield should be bonded at the antenna interface.
example_1_zh: 同軸線屏蔽層應在天線介面搭接。
example_2_en: Poor coax shield bonding may cause RF leakage.
example_2_zh: 同軸屏蔽搭接不良可能造成 RF 洩漏。

example_1_en: The avionics ring does not have a conductive chassis.
example_1_zh: 航電環沒有導電機殼。
example_2_en: Without a conductive chassis, shield termination becomes more difficult.
example_2_zh: 沒有導電機殼時，屏蔽端接會變得更困難。

chinese_meaning: 搭接編織帶；接地編織帶
example_1_en: A bonding strap should be short and wide.
example_1_zh: 搭接編織帶應該短而寬。
example_2_en: Long bonding straps are ineffective at high frequency.
example_2_zh: 過長的搭接編織帶在高頻下效果不佳。

example_1_en: Each subsystem enclosure should be bonded to the reference network.
example_1_zh: 每個子系統外殼都應搭接到參考網路。
example_2_en: A floating enclosure may increase radiated emissions.
example_2_zh: 浮接外殼可能增加輻射發射。

example_1_en: Umbilical transients may occur during disconnect.
example_1_zh: 臍帶纜線在斷開時可能產生暫態。
example_2_en: The avionics power input must tolerate umbilical transients.
example_2_zh: 航電電源輸入必須能承受臍帶纜線暫態。

example_1_en: Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461) and MIL-STD-464 are applicable standards.
example_1_zh: Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461) 與 MIL-STD-464 是適用標準。
example_2_en: Applicable standards should be listed before test planning begins.
example_2_zh: 在測試規劃開始前應列出適用標準。

example_1_en: Our goal is to support MIL-STD-464 compliance.
example_1_zh: 我們的目標是支撐 MIL-STD-464 合規。
example_2_en: Box-level compliance does not guarantee system-level compliance.
example_2_zh: 單機合規不代表系統級一定合規。
category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

example_1_en: The weight model is based on the ring geometry and copper coverage.
example_1_zh: 重量模型以環體幾何尺寸與銅箔覆蓋率為基礎。
example_2_en: Incorrect geometry will lead to an incorrect weight estimate.
example_2_zh: 幾何尺寸錯誤會導致重量估算錯誤。
